raw_step.observation: Workbook XML inspection confirmed the summary formula initially scanned I8:I15 instead of the full scenario table, so I corrected the gate range to I9:I16 and reran the builder.
raw_step.output: Formula range corrected and builder rerun successfully.
raw_step.reasoning: A one-row range miss would hide the last scenario, so the verification pass had to close that gap before finalizing.
raw_step.state_change: Summary gate logic now evaluates every scenario row.

task: Advanced high-value task: Construction Robotics Room Critical Metric Reconciliation. Scenario: a production incident review board wants to convert raw records into a repeatable decision process for construction robotics room. Embedded packet: Records: R1 doorway_m=65 obstacle_count=99 floor_slope_pct=4; R2 doorway_m=74 obstacle_count=95 floor_slope_pct=7; R3 doorway_m=60 obstacle_count=110 floor_slope_pct=3. Remediation options: O1 changes doorway_m by -12% cost=89000; O2 changes obstacle_count by -18% cost=103800; O3 changes floor_slope_pct by -25% cost=62200; max_budget=129600. Rules and constraints: robot requires doorway>=0.85m, obstacles<=5, slope<=2%; missing values cannot be imputed and all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: produce a concise gate decision that includes calculations, caveats, residual risk, and machine-readable exception labels. Deliver robotics_layout_2.xlsx + expert_memo.md with formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table. Do not invent inputs; mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
